2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new node type called N_MEMORY_PRIVATE to support devices that want to hotplug memory onto a node without exposing it for general consumption. The patch adds infrastructure for private nodes, including a per-node container, functions to check if a page resides on a private node or is managed by a zone device, and registration API for private nodes. It also updates sysfs attributes and helpers to handle private nodes correctly.
